<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Config / selectors only

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) and [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, `profiles/`, or personal screenshots with account data.
- [ ] I updated [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md) under `[Unreleased]` when the change is user-facing.
- [ ] I ran `ruff check scripts` (if `requirements-dev.txt` is installed) or verified behavior manually.
